title: rubus × lacaunensis
intro: Rubus × lacaunensis, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the American raspberry (Rubus allegheniensis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × lacaunensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and teas, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
